entry.title: cs50_AI_1
entry.content:
Algorithms and Data Structures to Approach

  1. Depth-First Search

    1. expands the deepest node int the frontier
    2. use stack to save nodes , last-in first-out
    3. completely explores the finite possibilities
    4. not necessarily finds the best solution[^Maze]

  2. Breadth-Fist Search

    1. expands the shallowest node in the frontier
    2. use queue to save nodes, first-in fist-out
    3. spend more time in average
    4. finds the optimal path[^Maze]

  3. Informed Search-Greedy Beast-First Search

    1. use problem-specific knowledge to fined solution
    2. expands the node that is closest to the goal,estimated by a heuristic function (it needs to be admissible, never overestimates the true cost and consistent,which means h(n)<=h(n+c steps)+c)

  4. MiniMax Algorithm

    1. minimax: MAX picks action a in Action(s) that produces the highest value of Min-Value(Result(s,a)), which means after this action a on state s , Min Player is less likely to win.
    2. But what is function Min-Value()? Basically, the idea is to recursively go through every possible actions, calculate the Max-Value(s,a) and find the a that makes the value smallest.
    3. Optimize-simple: if the Max-Value function reached a node that has already provides a lower value of Min-Value(Result(s,a)) for its recursive parent node, it can simply skip the node’s sibling nodes. (Alpha-Beata Pruning)
    4. Optimize-deeper: Depth-Limited MIniMax, in this situation, when the end layer of recursion if not the end of the game, we need an evaluation function(the important part of an AI) to estimate the utility of the game from a given state.

[^Maze]:searching for the optimal solution for a maze

entry.title: psychology_1
entry.content:
成熟和代价

引子

彼得潘看到了被时间怪兽追赶着的胡克船长，觉得变成大人一点都不好。于是去梦幻岛当了孩子王，与此同时错过了获得一段爱情的机会，只能通过幻想来虚构一个完美形象延续乌托邦般的童年……

这就引出了悖论似的问题：要不要牺牲拥有无数潜力可能的童年，来成熟，换取一个被现实束缚住的成年？如果要这样做的话，又是为什么呢？

回答

上面谈到为什么人要去成熟、成长，professor谈到两个原因：

  1. 主动去成长可以自己选择现实的框架，而不是让现实在中年以最不想要的方式包裹住自己。
    毕竟不去成长没有一个即刻的后果，你可以推迟成熟的过程，直到没有人继续包容巨婴。
    大学给了人拖延成熟的机会，没有人要求你在象牙塔中要成为怎样的人，直到步入社会。

  2. 小孩拥有只有潜能，就像我现在觉得自己干啥啥不行，但是身边人也只会说“你只要想干，肯定能行”，这就达成了一个默契而又危险的平衡。我深知自己很菜但是又懒于改变，只能被动拖延直到发现所谓的潜力真的兑现不了的时候。
    而如果自己努力去做成事，培养一方面的能力时，通过了略有痛苦的入门独木桥，就会发现可能性的大门再次敞开。

    人生的后半段就是在不断寻找学徒时的赤子之心 ——荣格

结论

成长过程中的牺牲不可避免。
承担责任的同时也会加强自我认同，至少我不是一无是处，我可以承担一点点责任……

词汇

apprentice 学徒
dichotomy 对立,二分
forestall 先发制人，预先阻止；垄断
dwelling 居住着的，住宅
traumatize 使……受精神创伤
tricky 棘手的
tyrant 暴君

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
